string.value: Let's go talk to Cassandra and ask her about the Aran Memory Fragments.
You have collected an Aran Memory Fragment.

Wow! I'm impressed. #b#h0##k I'm talking about your determination to find the Aran Memory Fragments. But if you don't collect all 12 of them, all your hard work will go to waste. Let's go out there and find their Memory Fragments!
It's not easy to collect all the Aran Memory Fragments, but you can't just quit here! You'll find another Memory Fragment if you just collect #b20#k #b#t4032369##ks...
I can't believe you're quitting after all this...
I thought you'd easily be able to collect #b20#k #b#t4032369##ks...
